name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you recently cancelled, and we just wanted to say thank you for giving Bright Smile Dental a try — no pressure, no hard feelings.

If life brings you back our way, here's 20% off your next visit:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days, and you can use it on a cleaning or any visit at checkout. Our new-patient consultations are always free, and we'll keep things painless and modern — same as always.

If something didn't feel right last time, I'd genuinely love to hear about it. Just hit reply — a real person reads every note.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick note that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is good for a few more days if you'd like to come back. No pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
